/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/qt-ai-assistant_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/ConfigManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/Conversation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/ConversationManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/LlmClient.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/InstanceIpc.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/core/GlobalShortcutPortal.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/ui/ChatWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-ai-assistant.dir/src/ui/TrayIcon.cpp.o" -o qt-ai-assistant  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
